title: selaginella frondosa
intro: Selaginella frondosa is a type of fern-like plant, also known as Indian pipegrass or lesser club moss, belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella frondosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine. Selaginella frondosa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
